---
title: "Team Runs"
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
runs_path <- "site/data/runs_latest.csv"
summ_path <- "site/data/summaries_latest.csv"

has_runs <- file.exists(runs_path)
has_summ <- file.exists(summ_path)

if (!has_runs || !has_summ) {
  cat("Run `Rscript tools/refresh_site_from_bq.R --project <GCP_PROJECT> --dataset coldchain_sim --n 50` to refresh site/data CSVs.\n")
} else {
  runs <- utils::read.csv(runs_path, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  summ <- utils::read.csv(summ_path, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

  cat("## Latest Published Runs\n\n")
  knitr::kable(utils::head(runs, 25))

  cat("\n\n## Scenario Distribution (CO2 kg total)\n\n")
  if (nrow(summ) > 0 && all(c("scenario", "co2_kg_total") %in% names(summ))) {
    op <- par(mar = c(8, 4, 2, 1))
    on.exit(par(op), add = TRUE)
    by_s <- tapply(summ$co2_kg_total, summ$scenario, mean, na.rm = TRUE)
    by_s <- by_s[order(by_s, decreasing = TRUE)]
    barplot(by_s, las = 2, ylab = "Mean CO2 kg", main = "Mean CO2 by Scenario")
  } else {
    cat("summaries_latest.csv missing required columns scenario/co2_kg_total\n")
  }
}
```
